qText: Suppose ‚āĻ is invested, and after 2 ūĚĎÉ years at 5% simple interest, it yields ‚āĻ ūĚĎĄ interest. If ‚āĻ is then invested for 2 years ūĚĎĄ at 5% simple interest, it yields ‚āĻ ūĚĎÖ interest. Which of the following is true?

An individual invested certain amounts in three different schemes A, B, and C at simple interest rates of 7% p.a., 9% p.a., and 11% p.a. respectively. If the total interest accrued in one year was ‚āĻ2520 and the amount invested in Scheme C was 250% of the amount invested in Scheme A and 300% of the amount invested in Scheme B, what was the amount invested in Scheme A ?
Two equal sums of money are lent at 10% and 8% simple interest per annum, respectively. After 3 years, the difference between the interests is ‚āĻ360.What is each sum?

Mohan borrows a sum of ‚āĻ4,22,092 at the rate of 20% per annum simple interest. At the end of the first year, he repays ‚āĻ21,679 towards the return of principal amount borrowed. If Mohan clears all pending dues at the end of the second year, including interest payment that accrued during the first year, how much does he pay (in ‚āĻ) at the end of the second year?

The simple interest earned on ‚āĻ2,800 at a rate of 10% per annum for 3 years is ‚āĻx and ‚āĻ1,736 is the simple interest earned on ‚āĻ6,200 at a rate of ūĚĎ• 14% for y years, then the value of is: ūĚĎ¶
A sum of ‚āĻ800 amounts to ‚āĻ1,040 in 3 years at simple interest. If the interest rate is increased by 3%, find the amount.

A person invests ‚āĻ5,000 at a simple interest rate of 5% per annum for 5 years. At the end of 5 years, she reinvests the entire amount at the same rate of interest for another 3 years. What will be the total interest earned by the person at the end of 8 years ?

In 't' years, the simple interest earned on a certain amount at the rate of 10% per annum is 5/8th of the principal amount. If the rate of interest is made three-fourth of 10% and the simple interest remains the same, which of the following statements is true about the changed value of time?
optText: ‚Äč(b) It becomes three-fourth of the time ‚Äėt‚Äô.‚Äč

qText: At a certain annual rate (rounded off to the nearest integer) of simple interest, a sum of money becomes nine times its original value in 21 years. By how much does the rate of interest change if the same sum of money has to become 12 times its original value in 25 years?
If a sum of money becomes ‚āĻ6,000 in 3 years and ‚āĻ10,500 in 7 years and 6 months at the same rate of simple interest, then what is the rate of interest?

Ravi borrowed some money at the rate of 5% per annum for the first three years, 8% per annum for the next two years and 10% per annum for the period beyond 5 years. If he paid a total simple interest of ‚āĻ12,750 at the end of 7 years, then how much money did he borrow?
What will be the total amount payable on ‚āĻ 25,000 in 2 years if the rate of simple interest in successive years is 4% and 5% respectively ?
A financial institution claims that it returns three times the principal in 25 years on a certain rate of simple interest per annum. What is the rate of simple interest?
The simple interest on a certain sum for 3 years at 8% per annum is ‚āĻ9120 less than the simple interest on the same sum for 7 years at 8% per annum. Find the sum.

Ashima borrowed ‚āĻ75,000 from a nationalized bank on 26th March 2022 at the rate of 9% per annum simple interest. If she cleared the account on 7th June of the same year, then what amount did she pay?
How long (in years) will a sum of money invested at 6% per annum simple interest to increase its value by 40% ?
What is the present worth of ‚āĻ1,100 due in 2 years at 5% simple interest per annum ?
The interest on a certain deposit at 4.5% p.a. is ‚āĻ135 in one year. How much will the additional interest in one year be on the same deposit at 5% p.a.?

A certain amount is lent at x% p.a. simple interest for 3 years. Instead, if the amount was lent at 3x% p.a. simple interest for 'y' more years, then the simple interest would have been seven times the earlier interest. What is the value of y ?

Archana took a loan of ‚āĻ78,000 from a bank on 24 ^th January 2012 at 8 3 4 % per annum simple interest and paid it back on 18 ^th June 2012. Find the total amount paid by Archana. (Approximated to nearest integer)

A man invests a total sum of ‚āĻ10,000 in a company. A part of the sum was invested at 10% simple interest per annum and the remaining part at 15% simple interest per annum. If the total interest accrued to him in two years equals ‚āĻ2,400, the sum invested at 15% simple interest per annum is:
A money lender finds that due to the fall in the annual rate of interest from 18% to 15%, his yearly income diminishes by Rs.750. His capital is:
Simple Interest received by a person in 12 years on a principal of Rs. 12000 is 120 percent of the principal. What is the annual rate of interest?

A sum of money becomes three times of itself at the rate of 10 percent per annum on simple interest. Which of the following statement(s) is/are correct? I. It will become 5 times of itself at the rate of 20 percent per annum on simple interest in the same time period. II. It will become 7 times of itself at the rate of 30 percent per annum on simple interest in the same time period.

1 of a certain sum is lent at 20 2 2 percent rate of interest. of the 5 remaining sum is lent at 25 percent rate of interest. The remaining sum is lent at 10 percent rate of interest. If the simple interest received on the total sum for 2 years is Rs. 360, then what is the sum ?

A person lent Rs. 23000 to B for 3 years and Rs. 19000 to C for 4 years on simple interest at the same rate of interest and received Rs. 3625 in all from both of them as interest. What is the annual rate of interest?
Suman paid ‚āĻ9,600 in interest on a loan she obtained 5 years ago with a simple interest rate of 16%. What was the amount of the loan she had taken?

Damani purchased an item costing ‚āĻ7,500 and paid ‚āĻ3,500 as a down payment for the same. If the simple interest charged for the remaining amount is 9% per annum and Damani cleared all dues after 4 months of the purchase, how much did Damani pay after 4 months as interest?

6 copies of a book can be bought for a certain sum payable at the end of a year and 7 copies of the same book can be bought for the same sum in cash money. What is the rate per annum of simple interest (correct to one decimal place)?
Find the interest accrued on a sum of Rs.1,680 in two years,at the rate of 4.375% simple interest per annum.

A sum of ‚āĻ5,000 is divided into two parts such that the simple interest on the 1 2 first part for 4 years at 6 % p.a. is 5 3 double the simple interest on the second 3 part for 2 years at 4% p.a. The ratio of 4 the second part to the first part is:

Eight copies of a book can be bought for a certain sum payable at the end of a year and ten copies of the same book can be bought for the same sum in cash money. What is the rate percentage of the interest?

A certain sum amounts to Rs 81840 in 3 years and to Rs 92,400 in 5 years at x% p.a. Under simple interest. If the rate of interest becomes (x + 2)%, then in how many years will the same sum double itself?

A man invested an amount of Rs 105750 at simple interest in the name of his son, daughter and his wife in such a way that they get the same interest after 3, 4 and 5 years respectively. If the rate of interest is 5% per annum, then the amount invested for the wife is:
A person invested a total of ‚āĻ 9,000 in three parts at 3%, 4% and 6% per annum on simple interest. At the end of a year, he received equal interest in all three cases. The amount invested at 6% is:

A man takes a loan of some amount at some rate of simple interest. After three years, the loan amount is doubled and the rate of interest is decreased by 2%. After 5 years, if the total interest paid on the whole is Rs 13,600, which is equal to the same when the first amount was taken for 11 1 3 years, then the loan taken initially is:

A sum of Rs. 12,000 was borrowed at a rate of simple interest. After four months, Rs. 6000 more was borrowed and rate of interest on the total principal was doubled than that of the previous rate. At the end of the year, 2800 was paid as the interest. Find the rate that was applicable in the initial.

A person invested a sum of Rs. 18,600 at x % p.a. and another sum that is twice the former at (x + 2) % p.a. , both at a simple interest. If the total interest earned on both investments for 3 1 2 years is Rs 23,110.50 , then the rate of interest p.a. on the second investment is.

A person invested one-fourth of the sum of Rs 25000 at a certain rate of simple interest and the rest at 4% p.a. higher rate. If the total interest received for 2 years is Rs 4,125. What is the rate at which the second sum was invested?
A sum amounts to Rs 14,395.20 at 9.25% p.a. simple interest in 5.4 years. What will be the simple interest on the same sum at 8.6 % p.a. in 4.5 years?
The simple interest on Rs x for m years at a rate of r % is equal to the same on Rs y for n years at the rate of s %, then ūĚĎ• is equal to: ūĚĎ¶
A sum doubles in seven years at simple interest. In how many years will the sum become five times the original sum ?

A sum of Rs 10000 is invested in three schemes of simple interest. The annual interest rates are respectively, 4%, 6% and 10%. Rs 4000 were invested in the first scheme. If the total interest earned after five years is Rs 2800, then how much money was invested in the third scheme?
A sum of Rs 1500 is invested at simple interest for x months. If the rate of ūĚĎ• interest is % per annum, then the sum 8 grows to Rs 1590. What is the value of x?
A certain sum was invested on simple interest. The amount to which it 1 had grown in five years was 1 times 4 the amount to which it had grown in three years. The percentage rate of interest was:

A borrows a sum of Rs 1000 from his friend B on 31 December 2015 on the condition that he will return the same after one year with simple interest at 12%. However, A gets into a position of returning the money on 1 May 2016. How much amount he has to return to B ?

Sunil lent ‚āĻ5,000 to Sudhir for 2 years and ‚āĻ3,000 to Vinod for 4 years at the same simple interest rate. In total, he received ‚āĻ4,400 as interest from both borrowers. What is the rate of interest per annum?

A person invested ‚āĻ10,000 in two schemes - Scheme A at 12% p.a. and Scheme B at 8% p.a., both under simple interest. After 1 year, the total interest from both schemes was ‚āĻ1,000. How much was invested in Scheme A?

Mohan borrowed a sum of money at simple interest of 7% per annum for the first 3 years, 5% per annum for the next 5 years, and 11% per annum for the period beyond 8 years. If he pays a total of ‚āĻ6800 as interest only at the end of 10 years, how much money did he borrow?

Ram and Mohan invest ‚āĻ70,000 and ‚āĻ50,000 respectively. After 1 year, the total profit is distributed including simple interest at 10% per annum on the capital of each partner. If the total profit including interest is ‚āĻ18,000, what is Ram's share of the profit ?

Aman needed ‚āĻ60,000 and split the sum between two lenders: Lender A at 18% p.a. and Lender B at 12% p.a. (simple interest). After 2 years, the total interest paid was ‚āĻ19,200. If he had interchanged the principal amounts, his interest would have been ‚āĻ2,400 less. How much did Aman borrow from Lender A at 18% p.a. ?

Sarah invested in three schemes M, N, and O at SI rates of 5%, 6%, and 10% p.a. Total interest in one year was ‚āĻ3664. The amount in O was 90% of M and 125% of N. What was the amount invested in Scheme N ?
A sum of ‚āĻ15000 is lent out in two parts, one at 14% simple interest and the other at 20% simple interest. If the annual interest is ‚āĻ2400, the sum lent at 20% is:

Rs. 1800 is lent at a certain rate of simple interest. After 9 months, another Rs. 1200 is lent at a rate that is 1.5 times the original rate. If the total simple interest after 1 year is Rs. 144, find the original rate.
A sum of ‚āĻ9000 is lent out in two parts, one at 6% simple interest and the other at 9% simple interest. If the annual interest is ‚āĻ630, the sum lent at 6% is:

Ramesh has ‚āĻ15,000. He lends a part of it to Asha for 3 years at 10% simple interest and the remaining to Meena for 3 years at 12% simple interest. If the total interest received from both Asha and Meena after 3 years is ‚āĻ4,950, find the amount lent to Asha.
Amar borrowed ‚āĻ6000 from Shankar on March 15, 2025, at 12% per annum simple interest. Amar decided to repay the loan on September 15, 2025. What is the total amount Amar must repay Shankar ?

Gaurav invested a total of ‚āĻ4400 in three different simple interest schemes at 4%, 5%, and 10% per annum for one year. At the end of one year, he received the same interest from all three schemes. How much money (in ‚āĻ) did he invest in the scheme with a 5 % interest rate?
Reena borrowed Rs. 1156 at simple interest for a number of years equal to the rate of interest. At the end of the loan term, she paid Rs. 289 in interest. What was the interest rate ?

A person invested ‚āĻ30,000 in two different schemes. He invested one part for 5 years at 6% simple interest and the other part for the same duration at 9% simple interest. If the interest earned from the second part was ‚āĻ1,950 more than the interest earned from the first part, how much money was invested in the first scheme ?

An educational fund of ‚āĻ6,00,000 earns simple interest at 11% per annum. This annual interest is used to grant three scholarships. If the first and third scholarships are ‚āĻ18,000 and ‚āĻ22,000 respectively, what is the value of the second scholarship?
Neha lent ‚āĻ14000 to John on 10 July 2024 at a simple interest rate of 8% per annum. John plans to pay back the entire amount on 10 October 2024. What is the total amount John needs to return?

If P, Q, and R are three amounts of money such that Q is the simple interest on P, and R is the simple interest on Q, all for the same time and at the same rate of interest, then which of the following is true?
At what rate of simple interest will ‚āĻ3,000 become ‚āĻ4,020 in 5 years?

A person invested ‚āĻ8,000 in one scheme at 6% simple interest and ‚āĻ5,000 in another scheme at 8% simple interest for the same duration. If he received a total interest of ‚āĻ2,640 from both investments, what was the duration (time period) of the investments ?
A sum becomes 3.1 times of itself in 7 years under simple interest. In how many years will it become 6 times itself at the same rate ?

A person invested a total sum of ‚āĻ2700 in three different schemes of simple interest at 3%, 4%, and 6% per annum. At the end of one year, he got the same interest from all three schemes. What was the amount (in ‚āĻ) invested at 6% ?
A shopkeeper took a loan of ‚āĻ7000 from a bank on 1 April 2023 with simple interest at 8% per annum. He decided to clear the loan on 1 October 2023. How much amount did he pay back to the bank?
A certain sum becomes 6 times itself in 7 years at simple interest. In how many years will it become 14 times itself at the same rate ?
If the simple interest on a sum of Rs. A at 12 % per annum for 4 years is equal to the simple interest on Rs. B at 8% per annum for 6 years, then what is the ratio of A to B ?
If the simple interest on a certain sum of money for 3 years at 8% per annum is ‚āĻ480, what would be the simple interest on the same sum for 5 years at 12% per annum ?
The compound interest on a certain sum for 2 years at 25% per annum is ‚āĻ625. Find the simple interest on the same sum at the same rate and period.
A sum amounts to ‚āĻ5,800 in 2 years and ‚āĻ6,200 in 4 years at simple interest. What is the rate of interest per annum?
A sum of ‚āĻ10000 is lent out in two parts, one at 4% simple interest and the other at 6% simple interest. If the annual interest is ‚āĻ520, the sum lent at 4% is:
What will the ratio be of the simple interest earned on a given amount at the same interest rate over 6 years compared to that earned over 10 years?

A donor deposits ‚āĻ10,00,000 in a trust that earns 8% simple interest annually. The interest is used to distribute three annual awards. If the second and third awards are ‚āĻ30,000 and ‚āĻ15,000 respectively, what is the value of the first award ?
If P = Rs. 2,500, R = 11.5%, and T = 2.5 years, find the simple interest.
If the simple interest on a certain sum of money for 2 years at 5% per annum is ‚āĻ500, what would be the simple interest on the same sum for 5 years at 6% per annum ?
Rs.3000 is lent out at 3% per annum simple interest for 3 years. Find the amount after 3 years.
If P = Rs. 2,400, R = 37.5%, and T = 2 years, find the simple interest.
In how many years will a sum of Rs. 8,000 give a simple interest of Rs. 3,000 at 12.5% per annum ?

Consider the following statements regarding simple interest: 1. The simple interest on ‚āĻ10,000 for 3 years at 15% per annum is ‚āĻ4,500. 2. If a sum of money doubles in 5 years at simple interest, then it will become 1.5 times in 3 years. 3. The simple interest rate required for an amount to become 4.5 times in 7 years is 50%. Of these statements, which are correct?
A sum fetches ‚āĻ3,600 as interest in 4 years at 9% per annum. What is the principal?
A sum of ‚āĻ4,000 becomes ‚āĻ5,200 in 3 years at simple interest. What is the rate of interest?
At what annual simple interest rate will a sum of money become 2.5 times in 10 years?
Find the time if ‚āĻ4,500 amounts to ‚āĻ5,400 at 10% simple interest.
At what rate will a sum of ‚āĻ2,400 earn ‚āĻ576 as simple interest in 4 years?
A person lends ‚āĻ50,000 at 10% simple interest per annum. What will be the interest earned in 3 years?
Ravi lent ‚āĻ15,000 to his friend at a simple interest rate of 10% per annum. After how many years will the total amount become ‚āĻ21,000 ?
If the simple interest on ‚āĻ20,000 for 4 years is ‚āĻ6,400, what is the rate of interest?
If a sum 1.5 times itself in 5 years at simple interest, what is the rate of interest per annum?
A sum of ‚āĻ24,000 is invested at a simple interest rate of 5% per annum. After how many years will the interest amount be ‚āĻ6,000 ?
If ‚āĻ800 earns ‚āĻ160 as interest in 2years, what is the rate of interest ?
What is the simple interest on ‚āĻ4,000 at 5% per annum for 7 years?
What is the principal if the simple interest at 8% for 3 years is ‚āĻ480?
How many years will it take for an investment of ‚āĻ4,500 to earn ‚āĻ900 as simple interest at an annual rate of 5%?
If the simple interest on ‚āĻ3,500 for 3 years is ‚āĻ525, what is the rate of interest?
A man lends ‚āĻ4,000 at 7% simple interest per annum and ‚āĻ5,000 at 6% simple interest per annum. What will be his total interest after 3 years?
A bank offers a savings scheme where ‚āĻ10,000 invested at simple interest grows to ‚āĻ15,000 in 2 years.
If ‚āĻ15,000 is deposited in a simple interest account that yields 10% annually, what will be the interest earned after two and a half years?

A man borrowed ‚āĻ15,000 from two different moneylenders. One charges 10% simple interest per annum, and the other 7%. After 2 years, the total interest paid was ‚āĻ2,700. Find how much he borrowed from each.
The difference between the simple interest on ‚āĻ6,000 for 3 years and 5 years at the same rate of interest per annum is ‚āĻ600. Find the rate of interest.
A person took a loan of ‚āĻ8,000 from the bank for 3 years at a simple interest rate of 6% per year. How much will he have to pay after the completion of the time period?
The compound interest on a 2 certain principal at 14 % per annum for 7 2 years is ‚āĻ330. What is the simple interest on the same principal for the same time and rate?
A sum on simple interest at the rate of 5% per annum amounts to ‚āĻ4,160 in 6 years. Find the sum.
Rohan deposited ‚āĻ500 for 2 years, ‚āĻ650 for 4 years and 1,300 for 6 years, at the same rate of interest. He received the total simple interest of ‚āĻ1,140. What is the rate of interest per annum?

Etika invested some amount at a rate 9% per annum and earns a S.I. of ‚āĻ810 after 3 years. If the rate of interest has been 4% higher, how much more interest (in ‚āĻ) would have Etika earned on the same amount in the same time period ?

Vipul, Ashima, and Priya invested a total of ‚āĻ21,000 at 3%, 6%, and 5% per annum, respectively, on simple interest. If at the end of the year, all three persons received an equal amount of interest, then the amount (in ‚āĻ) invested by Ashima is:

A person invested a certain sum of money at 6% per annum simple interest and another sum at 8% per annum simple interest at the same time. After 4 years, he received interest ‚āĻ1,560 from both sums. One-fifth of the first sum is equal to one-sixth of the second sum. Find the total sum invested.
What sum of money, when lent at 6% for 4 years, will produce the same 1 interest as 800 earns in 5 years at 4 % ‚āĻ 2

A borrows ‚āĻ7,500 for 4 years at 8% p.a. simple interest. B borrows the same amount at simple interest of 9% for the first year, 10% for the second year and 6% for the next two years. What is simple interest paid by A and B in total (in ‚āĻ) ?
Pooja invested a certain sum in a scheme at simple interest of r% per annum for 12.5 years and get interest 3 equal to of sum invested. 4

Raghu lends ‚āĻ9,600 and ‚āĻ11,800 at simple interest to two different persons for the same time at the rate of 7% per annum and 8% per annum, respectively. If he had received ‚āĻ9,696 as total interest from both, find the time period for which the amounts were lent.

A sum of ‚āĻ12,000 becomes double at simple interest in 7 years at a certain rate of simple interest. Find the time (in years) it takes for the amount to become ‚āĻ60,000 at the same rate of interest.

If a sum of ‚āĻ5,000 is taken at a simple rate of interest of 15% per annum for 3 years and another sum of ‚āĻ8,000 is taken at a simple interest of 12% per annum for 4 years, the positive difference of the interests paid is:

Ramesh has ‚āĻ18,000. He deposited ‚āĻ7,000 in a bank at the rate of 5% per annum and ‚āĻ6,000 in other bank at the rate of 6% per annum simple interest. If he received ‚āĻ1,160 as simple interest at the end of one year, then the rate of interest per annum on rest of the capital is equal to:

Kiran lent ‚āĻ4,000 to two persons such that one part of it at the rate of 8% per annum and the remaining part at the rate of 10% per annum. He got an annual simple interest of ‚āĻ352. Then the sum lent at 10% is:

Simple interest on a certain sum is one-fifth of the sum and the interest rate per cent per annum is 5 times the number of years. If the rate of interest increases by 3%, then how much will the simple interest (in ‚āĻ) be on ‚āĻ5,600 for 6 years?
The interest accrued on a sum of ‚āĻ16,000 lent at a simple interest rate of 14% p.a. for the time in those many years, which gives a simple interest of three-fifths of a certain sum at 10% p.a., is:

Sohan borrows a sum of ‚āĻ1,41,545 at the rate of 11% per annum simple interest. At the end of the first year, he repays ‚āĻ25,490 towards the return of principal amount borrowed. If Sohan clears all pending dues at the end of the second year, including interest payment that accrued during the first year, how much does he pay (in ‚āĻ) at the end of the second year?

A certain sum of money becomes seven times itself when invested at a certain rate of simple interest, in 14 years. How much time (in years, rounded off to 2 decimal places ) will it take to become 18 times itself at the same rate ?
A trader owes a merchant ‚āĻ9,810 due in 1 year, but the trader wants to settle the account after 6 months. If the rate of simple interest is 9% per annum, how much cash (in ‚āĻ) should he pay?

A sum of ‚āĻ10,000 is taken as a loan by Rajesh at a rate of 15% p.a. simple interest for 2 years. But Rajesh could not repay it at the agreed time and asked for an extension of two more years. So, the lender included the interest amount for the period as principal for the next two years at the same rate of interest. The total amount paid by Rajesh at the end of 4 years is:
A certain sum of money is given at a certain rate of simple interest for 6 years. Had it been given at 7% higher rate, it would have fetched ‚āĻ1,512 more. Find the sum (in ‚āĻ).

A total of ‚āĻ2,00,000 is divided into two parts for investing in different banks on simple interest. One yields 4% p.a. while the other yields 6% p.a. If the total interest at the end of one year is equivalent to 4.7% p.a. on the whole amount, the amount (in ‚āĻ) invested in each bank is ________, respectively.
A sum of ‚āĻ1,456, when invested for ten years, amounts to ‚āĻ2,366 on maturity. Find the rate of simple interest per annum that was to be paid on the sum invested.
The difference between the simple interests on the principal of ‚āĻ500 at an interest rate of 5% per annum for 3 years and 4% per annum for 4 years is:
In how much time (in years, rounded off to 2 decimal places) will ‚āĻ10,800 amount to ‚āĻ24,800 if invested at simple interest at the rate of 15.5% per annum?

Ramu lent ‚āĻ3,000 to Raju and a certain sum to Ravi at the same time and at the same rate of simple interest of 8% per annum. After 5 years, he received a sum of ‚āĻ1,600 from Raju and Ravi together as interest. Find the sum lent to Ravi.
If ‚āĻ1,875 becomes ‚āĻ2,625 in 4 years, what will ‚āĻ24,000 become at the end of 9 years at the same rate of interest, under simple interest?
In how many years will the simple interest on a sum of money be equal to 6 the principal at the rate of 2 % per 7 annum?

Reshma took a loan of ‚āĻ12,00,000 with simple interest for as many years as the rate of interest. If she paid ‚āĻ9,72,000 as interest at the end of the loan period, what was the rate of interest per annum
An amount becomes double in 7 years on simple interest. The amount would be four times in ___ years on the same rate of simple interest.
The simple interest on a sum of 1 money for 1 years at 10% per annum 2 is ‚āĻ30 more than the simple interest on the same sum for 1 year at 12% per annum. Find the sum.

A man invested a sum of ‚āĻ5,000 on simple interest for 5 years such that the rate of interest for the first 2 years is 10% per annum, for the next 3 years it is 12% per annum How much interest (in ‚āĻ), will he earn at the end of 5 years?
The simple interest on a sum for 4 8 years is of the sum. The rate of 5 interest per annum is:
How much time (in years) will it take for an amount of ‚āĻ4,50,000 to yield ‚āĻ45,000 as simple interest at a 5% per annum rate of interest ?

An amount of ‚āĻ8,000 was invested for 2 years, partly in scheme 1 at the rate of 5% simple interest per annum and the rest in scheme 2 at the rate of 4% simple Interest per annum. The total interest received at the end was ‚āĻ720. The amount of money invested in scheme 1 is:
An equal sum of money was lent to P and Q at 8.6% per annum for a period of 7 years and 8 years, respectively. If the difference in interest paid by them was ‚āĻ172, then the sum lent to each was:
If the ratio of principal and simple interest for 5 years is 10 : 7, then the rate of interest per annum is:
What will be the amount due on ‚āĻ12,000 in 2 years when the rate of simple interest on successive years is 9% and 10%, respectively ?

A sum of money becomes five times its original value in 15 years when invested at a certain simple interest rate. If the sum was invested twice the time at the same rate of interest, what would be the final amount?
optText: ‚Äč(a) The money becomes 9 times its‚Äč ‚Äčoriginal value‚Äč
‚Äč(b) The money becomes 7 times its‚Äč ‚Äčoriginal value‚Äč
‚Äč(c) The money becomes 6 times its‚Äč ‚Äčoriginal value‚Äč
‚Äč(d) The money becomes 8 times its‚Äč ‚Äčoriginal value‚Äč

qText: Ram invested a certain sum of money at simple interest. It amounted to 5 of itself in 3 years. What will be its 4 rate per cent per annum?
If a sum of ‚āĻ3,260 on simple interest amounts to ‚āĻ5,420 in 6 years, then what will this sum amount to in 4 years at the same rate of interest?
An amount invested fetched a total simple interest of ‚āĻ4,050 at the rate of 9% per annum in 5 years. What is the amount invested (in ‚āĻ)?
What will be the amount due on ‚āĻ36,000 in 2 years when the rate of simple interest for successive years is 8% and 6%, respectively ?

Ramu invested some money at 8% simple interest per annum, and it was grown up to ‚āĻ820 in 8 years. If the same sum was invested at 20% simple interest per annum for a period of 10 years, find the amount.
A sum of ‚āĻ5,000 was lent to two people, one at the rate of 16% and the other at the rate of 24%. If the simple interest after one year is ‚āĻ960, what is the sum lent at the higher rate?
A person borrowed ‚āĻ 1760 at 6% per annum and ‚āĻ 2240 at 9% per annum at simple interest for the same period. He had to pay ‚āĻ 1536 in all as interest. Find the time (in years).

A person deposited some amount of money in the bank at simple interest. After 20 years, the amount became nine times the amount deposited. In how many years will the amount become 13 times the amount if the interest rate remains the same?
A certain sum of money is given at a certain rate of simple interest for 4 years. Had it been given at 11% higher rate for the same time, it would have fetched ‚āĻ1320 more. Find the sum (in ‚āĻ).

A part of ‚āĻ48,500 is invested at a simple interest of 15% per annum. The rest of the money is invested at the rate of 10% simple interest per annum after 2 years of the first investment. The ratio of interest after 5 years from the time when the first amount was invested is 5 : 3. How much is the second part that was invested( in ‚āĻ) at the rate of 10% simple interest ?

If the simple interest on a certain sum of money for 20 months at the rate of 19.2% per annum exceeds the simple interest on the same sum for 15 months at the rate of 11.2% p.a. by ‚āĻ2,920, then what is the sum (in ‚āĻ to the nearest hundreds)?

Rohan buys a bike priced at ‚āĻ95,000. He pays ‚āĻ25,000 at once and the rest after 18 months, on which he is charged a simple interest at the rate of 10% per annum. The total amount (in ‚āĻ) he pays for the bike is:
Sanjana borrows ‚āĻ16,000 at 24% per annum simple interest and Savithri borrows ‚āĻ18,200 at 20% per annum simple interest. In how many years will their amounts of debts be equal?
On a deposit of ‚āĻ1,50,000, R gets ‚āĻ2,000 as interest on simple rate of interest in a year. How much amount (in ‚āĻ) should he deposit to get interest of ‚āĻ4,500 ?

A borrows ‚āĻ20,000 from B and C. B lends him a certain sum of money at 25% simple interest per annum, while C lends him the remaining sum of money at 21% simple interest per annum. The total interest paid by A in one year is ‚āĻ4,500. The sum (in ‚āĻ) borrowed from B is:

Mr Gogia invested an amount of ‚āĻ 13,900 divided into two different schemes A and B at the simple interest rate of 14% pa and 11% pa, respectively. If the total amount of simple interest earned in 2 years is ‚āĻ3,508, what was the amount invested in scheme B ?
A sum of money invested at simple interest amounts to ‚āĻ1,01,264 in 3 years and to ‚āĻ1,01,654 in 4 years. What was the sum invested (in ‚āĻ) ?

The simple interest on a certain sum is one-fifth of the sum and the interest rate per cent per annum is 3.2 times the number of years. If the rate of interest increases by 4%, then the simple interest (in ‚āĻ) on ‚āĻ7,500 for 4 years is:
A sum was put at simple interest at a certain rate for 4 years. Had it been put at 5% higher rate, it would have fetched ‚āĻ520 more. Find the sum.
If a certain sum of money at 5% per annum simple interest amounts to 1 ‚āĻ810 in 2 years, then the certain sum 2 is:
A bank gives simple interest at the rate of 4.5% per annum. How much money (in ‚āĻ) should a person deposit to get ‚āĻ7,500 as interest every year ?

‚āĻ50,000 is deposited in a bank account. There was already some money in the account. Now the bank gives ‚āĻ7,500 as simple interest in a year. The rate of simple interest is 4.5% per annum. How much money (in ‚āĻ) was already there in the account ?
A certain sum of money amounts to ‚āĻ1,250 in 4 years and to ‚āĻ1,520 in 5 1 2 years at a certain rate of simple interest. Find the rate of interest per annum (correct to two places of decimals).
In what duration (in years) will ‚āĻ1,500 amount to ‚āĻ2,250 at simple interest 10% per annum ?
Manish invested a certain sum of money at 10% per annum simple interest. If he receives an interest of ‚āĻ72780 after 1 year, the sum (in ‚āĻ) he invested is:
The simple interest on a sum of 9 money is of the sum. If the number 45 of years is numerically 5 times of rate percent per annum, then find the rate percent per annum.
A person borrowed some money on simple interest. After 3 years, he 4 returned of the money to the lender. 3 What was the rate of interest ?
In how many years will ‚āĻ2,500 invested at the rate of 16% p.a. simple interest, amount to ‚āĻ4,100 ?

Rajesh invested ‚āĻ10,000 by dividing it into two different investment schemes, A and B, at simple interest rates of 8% and 10%, respectively. If the total interest earned in 2 years is ‚āĻ1,680, the amount invested in scheme A is:
If an amount of ‚āĻ80 becomes ‚āĻ96 in 2 years in a bank account which gives simple annual interest, then an amount of ‚āĻ62,000 will become _____in the same account after 5 years.

Ramesh borrowed ‚āĻ15,000 at a certain rate of simple interest from a bank. He repaid (the principal but not interest) ‚āĻ6,000 after 5 years, and after 5 more years he paid ‚āĻ18,600 and settled his account. Find the rate of simple interest per annum.
Kanchan lent ‚āĻ10,000 for 2 years and ‚āĻ5,000 for 4 years at the same rate of simple interest. If the total interest received by Kanchan is ‚āĻ2,000, then what was the rate of interest?
A sum of money deposited at simple interest amounts to ‚āĻ1,020 in three years and ‚āĻ980 in two years. The sum deposited is :

A car dealer borrows ‚āĻ20,000 from a bank for a period of 2 years at a simple interest rate of 8% per annum. If he repays the loan in full at the end of the 2 year period, how much will he have to pay?
A sum invested at the rate of 6% simple interest per annum grows to ‚āĻ1,13,880 in 5 years. What is the simple interest, If the same amount is invested for 8 years at the rate of 9% per annum?
The ratio of principal and amount is 5 : 6 for one year. Find the rate of simple interest per annum?
The simple interest on a certain sum for 4 years at the rate of 15% pa. is ‚āĻ4,500 less than the simple interest on the same sum for 6 years at the same rate of interest. Find the sum
In a certain time, a sum becomes 5 times at the rate of 6% per annum on simple interest. At what rate of interest, the same sum becomes 8 times in the same duration?
If the ratio of the principal and the simple interest for 5 years is 10 : 7, then the rate of interest per annum is:
‚āĻ8,000 becomes ‚āĻ9,800 in three years at simple interest rate. If the rate of interest becomes two times of itself, then what will be the amount of the same principle in four years?
A certain sum of money lent out at simple interest amounts to ‚āĻ12,600 in 2 years and ‚āĻ16,200 in 4 years. The rate percent per annum is:
The simple interest on a sum of money is four times the principal. The rate percent per annum and time in years are equal. Find the rate percent per annum.

A certain sum is invested at a simple interest rate of 12% per annum for a certain period of time. If the sum becomes four times the principal at the end of the period, what is the duration of the investment?

A man deposited ‚āĻ10,000 at simple interest in a fund. The interest rate on the fund increases by 4% every year. If the interest rate at the time of the amount deposit was 8%, what is the interest earned (in ‚āĻ) by him after 5 years
If the simple interest on a certain sum of money is ‚āĻ11,220 at the rate of 1 16 % per annum for 8 years and 3 2 months, then what is the principal amount (in ‚āĻ, rounded off to the nearest rupee)?

A man invested ‚āĻ25,400 on simple interest for 9 years to obtain a total amount of ‚āĻ67,790 on a certain annual rate of interest. What was the rate of interest (rounded off to 2 decimal places) to obtain the above amount?
